meta.title: CosmoRemote
meta.description: Your coding agents, finally off the desk. Control Claude Code and Codex from your phone with live streaming and remote relay.

hero.title: CosmoRemote
hero.subtitle: Your coding agents, finally off the desk
hero.description: Install once, pair with a QR, and watch your agents work live — from the couch, the train, or a coffee shop across town.
hero.note: iPhone and iPad are live now. Android is still marked Coming Soon.

features.title: Stay in flow, wherever you code
features.description: From local pairing to remote relay — switch context fast, and keep every token of history.

items.title: One command to install
items.description: Install the bridge with brew, winget, or a single curl. You're live in seconds.

items.title: It boots itself, shows the QR
items.description: Auto-detects Claude Code and Codex, spins up a local WebSocket, and prints the pairing QR in your terminal.

items.title: Claude or Codex — your call
items.description: Pick the CLI per session. Switch any time before you send.

items.title: Jump between projects
items.description: Save projects under friendly names. Tap once to swap context.

items.title: Watch it think in real time
items.description: Token-by-token output with auto-scroll. Zero polling, zero lag.

items.title: Grab the answer in one tap
items.description: Copy the whole session or a single code block, instantly.

items.title: Always know you're connected
items.description: Crystal-clear badges for local, remote, and offline — no guessing.

screenshots.title: See it in motion
screenshots.description: A quick tour: live streaming, your session timeline, and the QR handshake.

items.title: Live streaming
items.caption: Token-by-token output with connection status and project path.

items.title: Session list
items.caption: Jump between active, remote, and offline sessions in one timeline.

items.title: QR pairing
items.caption: Fast local connection with an encrypted token handshake.

pricing.title: Start free. Go Pro when you want more.
pricing.description: Localized pricing with your first week free on Pro. Free still covers the daily flow, and Pro removes the ceiling.
pricing.monthlyDescription: Start with one week free, then stay month to month. Cancel anytime.
pricing.yearlyDescription: Start with one week free, then keep every Pro feature for a full year at the best price.
pricing.yearlyComparisonTemplate: {monthlyTotal} if billed monthly vs {yearly} on the annual plan.

downloads.title: Platform rollout status
downloads.description: iPhone and iPad are already available. Android stays clearly marked Coming Soon until its store release is ready.

cards.title: iPhone
cards.note: Remote control, live streaming, and full history — right in your pocket.

cards.title: iPad
cards.note: More room for sessions, project switching, and copy workflows.

cards.title: Android
cards.note: Same local bridge, same relay — cross-device continuity without the fuss.

faq.title: Straight answers before launch
faq.description: No inflated metrics, no fake store links. Just the details that matter.

questions.question: Is CosmoRemote live yet?
questions.answer: iPhone and iPad are already available. Android is still marked Coming Soon until its store release is ready.

questions.question: How does local pairing work?
questions.answer: Run cosmoremote start, scan the QR, and the app finds your Mac on the same Wi-Fi. The connection is instant.

questions.question: Can I switch between Claude Code and Codex?
questions.answer: Yes. You pick the CLI per session before sending commands.

questions.question: What's included in Free?
questions.answer: Everything you need day to day: install, pairing, streaming, full session history, and 20 messages per day.

questions.question: What does Pro unlock?
questions.answer: Parallel sessions, unlimited messages (no daily cap), multiple Macs, and restore purchases.

questions.question: Why pick yearly?
questions.answer: Yearly ({{yearly_price}}) saves {{yearly_savings}} compared with paying {{monthly_price}} every month for 12 months.

footer.tagline: Coding agents that follow you everywhere.

legal.honesty: Real rollout status. No fake installs, ratings, or reviews.
